IMPL-PH35-STABILIZATION-FIRM.title: [Phase 35] Atomic Firm Factory Implementation
IMPL-PH35-STABILIZATION-FIRM.instruction_raw: Implement the atomic `FirmFactory` providing registration, account opening, and capitalization in a single workflow. Prevent 'Ghost Firms' (TD-LIFECYCLE-GHOST-FIRM). Refer to the spec for details.

STABILIZATION-PH35.title: System Stabilization & Memory Leak Resolution
STABILIZATION-PH35.instruction_raw: Implement lifecycle hygiene fixes, break reference cycles, and refactor engine caching to resolve system-level memory leaks and crashes.

IMPL-PH35-TEST-HYGIENE.title: [Phase 35] Test Hygiene & Mock Leak Resolution
IMPL-PH35-TEST-HYGIENE.instruction_raw: Implement recursive mock reset and resolve test regressions/DTO anti-patterns (Hypothesis 4 + Test Debt).

IMPL-PH36-B-DISPATCHER.title: [Phase 36-2] Unified Transfer Dispatcher
IMPL-PH36-B-DISPATCHER.instruction_raw: Execute Phase 36-2: Implement TransactionType Enum and Handler Registry in SettlementSystem.

IMPL-PH36-C-HANDLERS.title: [Phase 36-3] Specialized Transfer Handlers
IMPL-PH36-C-HANDLERS.instruction_raw: Execute Phase 36-3: Implement specific handles for Tax, Wage, Dividend, and Bailout transactions.

IMPL-PH36-D-ENFORCEMENT.title: [Phase 36-4] SSoT Enforcement (Lockdown)
IMPL-PH36-D-ENFORCEMENT.instruction_raw: Execute Phase 36-4: Implement FinancialSentry and raise SystemicIntegrityError for direct balance mutations in Agents.

fix_household_tests.title: Harden Household Tests (Unit Integrity & Protocol Adherence)
fix_household_tests.instruction_raw: Address issues in `DecisionUnit` (modules/household/decision_unit.py and tests): 1) Fix the 'pennies vs. dollars' ambiguity in `panic_selling_asset_threshold` comparison. 2) Replace `hasattr(housing_system, ...)` with `isinstance(..., IHousingSystem)` protocol checks.

fix_government_tests.title: Harden Government Tests (Vibe Check & Mutation Risk)
fix_government_tests.instruction_raw: Address risks in Government tests: 1) Replace the string 'UNKNOWN_BUYER' in `test_fiscal_bond_service.py` with a proper `AgentID` or Null Object compatible with integer parsing. 2) Review direct state mutation of `income_tax_rate` in `PoliticsSystem`.

fix_market_tests.title: Harden Market Tests (Lifecycle Hygiene & Mock Drift)
fix_market_tests.instruction_raw: Improve Market tests: 1) Convert `unittest.TestCase` usage in `test_precision_matching.py` to `pytest` format. 2) Replace manual `MockBuyer` and `MockSeller` in `test_housing_transaction_handler.py` with `MagicMock(spec=...)` or proper `create_autospec` to prevent mock drift. 3) Enforce `price_pennies` (int) usage over deprecated `price_limit` (float) in CanonicalOrderDTO interactions.

fix_simulation_systems.title: Harden Simulation Systems (DTO Safeties & Test Optimizations)
fix_simulation_systems.instruction_raw: Fix failing integration tests related to DTOs: 1) Update `HousingTransactionHandler` and `SettlementSystem` to handle `TransactionMetadataDTO` safely (use `getattr` instead of dict `get` if it's an object, or access `.metadata` safely). 2) Optimize `SimulationInitializer` test patching to reduce setup latency.

fix_integration_tests.title: Harden Integration Scenarios (Mock Cleanup & Fragility)
fix_integration_tests.instruction_raw: Improve integration test stability: 1) Move the `gc_collect_harder` logic from `test_scenario_runner.py` into a standard `pytest` fixture in `conftest.py` for uniform cleanup. 2) Replace hardcoded `time.sleep` in E2E tests with appropriate wait conditions. 3) Address the skipped assertion in `verify_leviathan.py`.
